---
title: "FinalProject"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r question geartypes}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
geartypes<-read.csv("/cloud/project/fish-catch-gear-type.csv")
geartypesdf<-data.frame(geartypes)
wrldgear<-filter(geartypesdf,Entity=="World")
wide_data<- data.frame(Year=wrldgear$Year,Unknown.gear=wrldgear$Unknown.gear,other.gear=wrldgear$Other.gear,longline=wrldgear$Longline,gillnet=wrldgear$Gillnet,small.scale=wrldgear$Small.scale,purse.seine=wrldgear$Purse.seine,pelagic.trawl=wrldgear$Pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl=wrldgear$Bottom.trawl)
wrldgear.long<-wide_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(Unknown.gear,other.gear,longline,gillnet,small.scale,purse.seine,pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl),names_to = "Gear.Type",values_to = "Count")
 ggplot(wrldgear.long,aes(x=Year,y=Count,fill=Gear.Type)) + geom_area(position= "fill")+labs(title="Fish Catch by Gear Type over time", y= "Proportions", fill= " Gear Type")+scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set2")+xlim(1974,2018)
```

```{r}
fractions<- wrldgear.long %>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  mutate(Proportion= Count/sum(Count, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-Count)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Gear.Type", values_from = "Proportion")
fractions<-fractions[25:69,]
wrldstocks2<-wrldstocks[1:45,]
fractions$biologically.sustainable<- wrldstocks2$Biologically.sustainable

```

```{r}
response_var<-names(fractions)[ncol(fractions)]
fractions.for.plot<- fractions %>%
  pivot_longer( cols= -c( Year, all_of(response_var)), names_to = "Predictor", values_to= "Value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= Value, y= .data[[response_var]])) + geom_point(alpha= 0.5)+geom_smooth(method="lm", se= TRUE, color="black")+facet_wrap(~Predictor, scales= "free_x")+ labs(x= "Predictor Value", y= response_var, title= "Regression of Each Gear Type Against Proportion of Fish Stocks Classified as Biologically Sustainable")+ theme(plot.title = element_text(size=7.5), plot.margin = margin(15,10,10,10 ))
print(fractions.for.plot)
```
